title: Ecommerce Website
subtitle: D Fashion Hub – Full-Stack Fashion Store
description: A fully-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory, secure payments, and an intuitive admin dashboard for product management.
fullDescription:
D Fashion Hub is a complete fashion e-commerce platform built for the modern shopper. The platform covers Women's, Men's, and Kids' fashion with categories including Dresses, Jackets, Skirts, Shoes & Bags, and Gift Cards. Users can explore hundreds of products, filter by category, add to cart, manage wishlists, and track orders — all within a seamless shopping experience.

The admin dashboard enables product management, inventory tracking, and sales analytics in real time. A secure checkout flow integrates payment processing with support for multiple currencies, while trust-building features (30-day returns, 2-year warranty, free delivery over a threshold) keep conversion rates high.
features: Multi-category catalog (Women's, Men's, Kids)
User authentication & account management
Shopping cart & wishlist functionality
Secure payment processing & order tracking
Admin dashboard with inventory management
Newsletter subscription & contact form
Responsive mobile-first design
30-day returns, free delivery & warranty trust signals

title: Speaker Event Manager
subtitle: Event Management & Analytics Platform
description: A comprehensive event management system for organizing and promoting speaker events with registration, scheduling, and analytics.
fullDescription:
The Speaker Event Manager is a full-featured platform designed to simplify the logistics behind organizing speaker events. Organizers can create events, manage speaker registrations, set scheduling slots, and monitor real-time attendee engagement through an intuitive analytics dashboard.

Built with React and TypeScript on the frontend and Node.js on the backend, the application uses Sass for polished custom styling. The platform provides a seamless experience from event creation to post-event analytics — all in one place. Attendees get a smooth registration flow while organizers gain valuable insights through live dashboards.
features: Event creation and full management dashboard
Speaker registration & profile management
Dynamic scheduling and time-slot configuration
Real-time attendee registration tracking
Analytics dashboard with engagement metrics
Custom Sass UI with polished component design
TypeScript for robust type-safe development
RESTful API backend with Node.js

title: AI Powered Animated Website
subtitle: NEXUS – Enterprise AI Infrastructure Platform
description: An AI-powered animated website featuring dynamic visualizations and interactive elements showcasing a next-gen AI platform.
fullDescription:
NEXUS is a visually stunning animated landing page for an enterprise-grade AI infrastructure platform. The site showcases complex React animations with Sass-powered styling and TypeScript type safety. It features an animated hero section with live performance metric counters, a features showcase, testimonials, pricing tiers, and a company timeline.

The platform highlights impressive AI capabilities including 99.7% model accuracy, sub-12ms latency, 1.4TB/s throughput, and 180+ global edge points of presence. Three pricing tiers — Starter (free), Professional ($299/mo), and Enterprise (custom) — are presented with smooth scroll animations and interactive UI elements throughout the page.
features: Animated hero with live performance metric counters
Interactive 6-feature grid (Speed, Security, Scale)
Company growth timeline with milestone animations
Customer testimonials with enterprise quotes
Three-tier pricing section (Free / Pro / Enterprise)
Contact form with multiple office locations
Smooth scroll and intersection-based animations
Fully responsive across all screen sizes

title: Church Website
subtitle: Bhimphedi Christian Church – Community & Ministry Platform
description: A church website providing information about services, events, and community activities with sermon access and online giving.
fullDescription:
Bhimphedi Christian Church's website serves a growing community across four branch locations in Nepal. The platform connects members and visitors with all aspects of church life — from weekly service schedules to upcoming events, sermons, and ministry programs.

The site features a sermon library (audio/video access), an online donations platform supporting global outreach and media broadcast, an events calendar, four branch location pages, and member testimonials. Built with React and TypeScript, the fully responsive platform serves multiple congregations simultaneously, including Saturday main services, weekday prayer meetings, and the women's ministry. The design emphasizes community connection and ease of access to church resources.
features: 8-section website (Home, About, Services, Ministries, Sermons, Events, Branches, Contact)
Weekly multi-day service schedule display
Sermon library with audio and video access
Upcoming events calendar (Festival of Life, Youth Summit)
Online giving platform for outreach and media support
4 branch location pages across Nepal
Member testimonials and transformation stories
Responsive design across all devices

title: Todo and Notes App
subtitle: Productivity App – Smart Note-Taking & Task Manager
description: A smart productivity application combining todo lists and rich note-taking with categories, tags, favorites, and archive.
fullDescription:
The Todo and Notes App is a polished productivity tool built with pure HTML, CSS, and JavaScript — no frameworks, just clean and efficient vanilla code. Users can create, organize, and manage both task lists and rich notes from a single distraction-free interface.

The app provides six predefined categories (Personal, Work, Study, Ideas, To-Do, Other), custom tagging for flexible filtering, a powerful search system, word and character counters, color coding per note, a favorites system for quick access, and an archive for completed items. The minimal, clean design keeps focus on content rather than complexity.
features: Create and manage notes and to-do lists
6 predefined categories (Personal, Work, Study, Ideas, To-Do, Other)
Custom tag system with tag-based filtering
Favorites system for quick access
Archive for completed or inactive notes
Search and filter by tags or content
Word and character counter per note
Color coding for visual organization

title: Hotel Booking Platform
subtitle: IHG-Inspired – Travel & Hospitality Booking System
description: A modern hotel booking platform with real-time availability, advanced filtering, loyalty rewards, and a user-friendly booking flow.
fullDescription:
Inspired by IHG's hotel booking system, this platform delivers a premium hotel search and booking experience. Users can search by destination, dates, and guest configuration — with results displayed in both list and interactive map views.

The platform features advanced filtering by amenities and hotel brand, an integrated loyalty rewards program, detailed room and rate comparisons, customer reviews with ratings, and a secure multi-step checkout. Built with Next.js for server-side rendering, Prisma as the ORM, PostgreSQL for persistence, and deployed on Vercel. The UI closely mirrors real-world hotel booking platforms with a clean, professional interface.
features: Destination search with flexible date picker
Room and guest count configuration
Real-time hotel availability checks & filtering
Map view and list view for search results
Loyalty rewards program (IHG One Rewards style)
Hotel ratings, reviews & full amenity details
Secure multi-step booking and checkout flow
Phone support and live chat integration

title: Rastriya Banijya Bank user dashboard
subtitle: Rastriya Banijya Bank – Angular Banking Dashboard Application
description: A feature-rich banking dashboard built with Angular and SCSS, offering multi-account management, transaction history, fund transfers, and card management in a polished modern UI.
fullDescription:
Rastriya Banijya Bank is a fully-featured online banking dashboard built with Angular 21 and SCSS, simulating a real-world digital banking experience. The platform supports three account types — Checking, Savings, and Investment — giving users a consolidated total balance view alongside a time-aware greeting and smooth navigation through a collapsible sidebar.

The dashboard displays a live transaction feed with 15+ categorized entries (Income, Shopping, Food, Entertainment, Transport, Bills, Transfer) and tracks each transaction's status — completed, pending, or failed. Users can initiate fund transfers to saved beneficiaries through a two-step review-and-confirm flow with a $50,000 per-transaction limit. Card management covers both Visa and Mastercard with an instant block/unblock toggle, while a notification center tracks credit alerts, pending payments, and card events with read/unread state. Skeleton loading animations and toast notifications round out the polished UX.
features: Dashboard with total balance overview across Checking, Savings & Investment accounts
Transaction history with 7 categories and completed/pending/failed status tracking
Fund transfer with beneficiary selection and two-step review & confirm flow
Card management for Visa & Mastercard with instant block/unblock toggle
Notification center with read/unread state and mark-all-read action
User authentication — login and registration pages
Collapsible sidebar navigation with toast notification system
Skeleton loading animations for smooth data-fetch experience

title: Social Media Dashboard
subtitle: SocialPulse – Multi-Platform Analytics & Publishing Dashboard
description: A polished Vue social media dashboard for tracking followers, reach, engagement, top posts, live activity, and publishing workflows across major platforms.
fullDescription:
SocialPulse is a modern social media command center built with Vue 3, TypeScript, and Vite. It gives creators and marketing teams a clear overview of their online performance with KPI cards for total followers, monthly reach, average engagement, and posts published during the month. The dashboard combines animated metrics, a weekly engagement chart, top-performing post rankings, and a live activity feed in one responsive interface.

The app also supports practical workflow actions: users can create new posts, target multiple platforms, track character count, optionally schedule content, and export performance reports as CSV files. A complete settings area adds account editing, notification preferences, privacy controls, third-party integrations, billing plans, and invoice history. Dark/light theme switching and mobile-friendly navigation make the experience feel like a real SaaS analytics product rather than a static demo.
features: Overview KPI cards for followers, monthly reach, average engagement, and post volume
Interactive weekly engagement chart for Instagram, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn
Platform cards showing followers, growth, post count, and reach for four networks
Live activity feed with recent likes, comments, shares, follows, and mentions
Top-performing posts table with ranking, likes, reach, and publishing date
New post modal with multi-platform selection, character counter, and optional scheduling
CSV report export for dashboard statistics and created content
Full settings area for account, notifications, privacy, integrations, billing, and invoices
Dark/light theme toggle with responsive layout and mobile navigation

title: Booknest – Book Search Website
subtitle: Book Discovery, Personal Library & Reading Tracker
description: A responsive Vue book discovery app for searching the Open Library catalog, exploring book details, saving personal reading lists, and tracking reading progress.
fullDescription:
Booknest is a responsive book discovery and reading companion built with Vue 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Vue Router, Bootstrap, and Sass. It connects to the Open Library API so readers can search across millions of catalog records by title, author, subject, or ISBN, browse popular genres, sort results, and open detailed pages with covers, ratings, publication information, availability, descriptions, and related recommendations.

Readers can save books into a persistent personal library, organize them as Want to read, Reading, or Finished, and update their progress directly in the browser. The app also includes a focused preview reader with adjustable font size and paper, sepia, and night themes, plus responsive navigation, light/dark appearance modes, loading skeletons, empty states, API caching, and fallback content when the book service is unavailable.
features: Open Library search by title, author, subject, and ISBN
Genre browsing with debounced search and URL-based filters
Result sorting by relevance, rating, newest publication, and title
Detailed book pages with covers, ratings, subjects, availability, and similar recommendations
Persistent personal library stored privately in the browser
Want to read, Reading, and Finished shelves with progress tracking
Focused preview reader with adjustable font size and three reading themes
Light and dark appearance modes with responsive desktop and mobile navigation
Loading skeletons, empty states, API caching, and offline fallback books
